name: Creamy Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounce can condensed cream of chicken soup
4 ounce can mushroom stems and pieces, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. Stir milk into the soup in a bowl.
3. Add chicken, half the cheese, mushrooms, pimiento, and cooked macaroni to the soup mixture; mix well.
4. Turn the mixture into a 2-quart casserole.
5. Bake, covered, at 350 degrees for 50 minutes.
6. Uncover and stir the casserole.
7. Top with the remaining cheese and bake until the cheese melts, 2 to 3 minutes longer.
